response:
<<no way out: the unheard story of meera>>  
text  
the slums of mumbai are a place where the residents are completely hopeless with no future prospects. the residents are constantly faced with insurmountable challenges and systemic oppression. the system is designed to keep them in place, to prevent them from ever escaping. the power dynamics are such that even the smallest sliver of hope is taken away. the residents are forced to accept their fate, to live in silence, to accept the reality that they are never going to escape. the system is built to ensure that they remain in the slums, that they never have a chance to rise. the only way out is through the system, through the very structures that are meant to keep them trapped. the residents are told that they are not worthy of a better life, that they are doomed to fail. the system
